---
description: UX and interaction guidance for My Launchpad
applyTo: "**/*.swift"
---

# UX Design Skills - My Launchpad

## UX Principles

- Keep primary actions obvious and low-friction.
- Use progressive disclosure for advanced controls.
- Preserve user context during navigation and edits.
- Provide immediate feedback for user actions.

## Accessibility

- Ensure keyboard navigation and focus visibility.
- Use sufficient contrast and readable text sizing.
- Add labels and hints for assistive technologies.
- Avoid motion that obscures meaning; respect reduced-motion settings.

## Domain Focus

For My Launchpad (macOS app launcher with groups, hotkeys, and drag-drop organization):
- Optimize the most frequent workflow first.
- Reduce setup friction for first-time use.
- Keep advanced customization discoverable but non-blocking.
